selected_feat.title: Runner 运行监控流
selected_feat.goal: 冻结 runner 的观察面，让 ready backlog、running、failed、deadletters 与 waiting-human 成为用户可见的正式产品面。
scope: 定义 monitor surface：runner observability surface。
定义 ready backlog、running jobs、failed jobs、deadletters、waiting-human jobs 的最小可见集合。
定义监控面如何服务 operator 判断继续运行、恢复还是人工介入。
constraints: runner observability surface 必须覆盖 ready backlog、running、failed、deadletters、waiting-human 等关键状态。
监控面必须读取 authoritative runner state，而不是靠目录猜测或人工拼接。
监控面只负责观察和提示，不直接改写 runner control state。
观测结果必须能关联到 ready job、invocation 和 execution outcome lineage。

acceptance_checks.given: the runner is operating on execution jobs
acceptance_checks.when: an operator inspects the monitoring surface
acceptance_checks.then: ready backlog, running jobs, failed jobs, deadletters, and waiting-human jobs must be visible as formal runtime states.

acceptance_checks.given: a failure or stuck state exists
acceptance_checks.when: the operator reads the monitoring surface
acceptance_checks.then: the product surface must support resume, retry, or handoff decisions instead of acting as a passive log dump.

acceptance_checks.given: EPIC-SRC-003-001 requires operators to monitor automatic progression
acceptance_checks.when: FEAT-SRC-003-007 is reviewed as a product surface
acceptance_checks.then: The FEAT must make ready backlog, running, failed, deadletters, and waiting-human states visible from one authoritative monitoring surface.

architecture.reason: 运行监控流属于 execution runner 主架构的观测面扩展。

api.reason: 运行监控需要扩展 runner 指标投影与事件查询契约。

ui.reason: 运行监控是既有 runner operator shell 上的观测面增量。

prototype.reason: 运行监控流程是在已有 runner operator 主流程上的扩展。

tech.reason: 运行监控需要独立实现策略来汇总 runner 状态与异常视图。

create_justification_summary: tech: TECH-SRC-003-007 -> 运行监控需要独立实现策略来汇总 runner 状态与异常视图。 | signals: new reusable implementation strategy package, future multi-feat reuse
